# audiosentinel Demo Worker

This folder contains a Cloudflare Worker demonstration of the `audiosentinel` Python package.
The demo provides a web interface where users can upload an audio file, and the worker utilizes `audiosentinel` to evaluate if the audio is likely human-recorded or AI-generated.

Features:
- Pure-Python execution via Pyodide.
- Minimalist, fast, and interactive UI for audio upload.
- Displays analysis results (Human vs AI).

Relevant Links:
- PyPI: https://pypi.org/project/audiosentinel/
- Author: https://pypi.rosetraviss.uk
